---
title: "Media"
---

My research has been covered by news organizations and I am available as a commentator on policing and active shooter topics. If you are a journalist or producer seeking comment, please use the [contact form](contact.qmd).

```{r media-setup}
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

media <- yaml::read_yaml("data/media.yaml")

type_labels <- list(
  print   = "Print",
  online  = "Online",
  radio   = "Radio",
  tv      = "Television",
  podcast = "Podcast"
)

render_media_entry <- function(m) {
  # Type badge
  type_str <- if (!is.null(m$type) && !is.na(m$type)) {
    label <- if (!is.null(type_labels[[m$type]])) type_labels[[m$type]] else m$type
    sprintf(
      '<span style="background:#e2e8f0; color:#4a5568; font-weight:500; font-size:0.72rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem; border-radius: 3px; margin-left: 0.4rem;">%s</span>',
      label
    )
  } else ""

  # Title (linked if URL exists)
  title_html <- if (!is.null(m$url) && !is.na(m$url)) {
    sprintf('<div class="media-title"><a href="%s">%s</a></div>', m$url, m$title)
  } else {
    sprintf('<div class="media-title">%s</div>', m$title)
  }

  # Optional description
  desc_html <- if (!is.null(m$description) && !is.na(m$description)) {
    sprintf('<div class="media-meta">%s</div>', m$description)
  } else ""

  HTML(sprintf(
    '<div class="media-entry">
  <div class="media-outlet">%s%s</div>
  %s
  <div class="media-meta">%s</div>
  %s
</div>',
    m$outlet,
    type_str,
    title_html,
    m$date,
    desc_html
  ))
}

# Sort by date descending
dates <- sapply(media, function(m) m$date)
media  <- media[order(dates, decreasing = TRUE)]
```

```{r}
tagList(lapply(media, render_media_entry))
```
